resolution_summary: Fixed in EXP-468-HOL-MISSING-c2-reactive-prose-pattern.json. Changed 'Every observable dome-site response to critique on this tab is rhetorical' to 'Every observable dome-site response to critique on this tab is non-canary-fixing'. Removes loaded framing (rhetorical) that contradicted para-1's credit for substantive engagement; replaces with a precise, mechanically-defined description that is defensible and consistent.
action_for_decider: integrate EXP-468 (now revised); close ISS-2405 as resolved
